summary: PracticeMenuPage now exposes inline image/video preview for existing non-media tacit browse items through a bundle-only menuView helper, without changing practice store/runtime/query/session/admin boundaries. menuView vitest 28/28 passed, npx tsc --noEmit passed, npm run lint produced no new issues beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73, and the reported build result was pass.
